category_sources: source_facts.description says Virtual PC simulator for testing IP routing; official GNS3/vpcs README describes Simple Virtual PC Simulator.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is vpcs; official GitHub README title uses VPCS.
docs_sources: Official GNS3/vpcs README is the best available project documentation surface found.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/GNS3/vpcs, so repo is intentionally not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNS3/vpcs README identify a virtual PC simulator used for routing/network connectivity testing.
